---
title: "Projects"
---

## Expense Analysis Dashboard

Developed a dashboard to analyze monthly operating costs and identify spending trends.

**Tools:** Excel, Power Query, Power BI

**What I did:**
- Cleaned and transformed financial data
- Built dashboards to track cost categories
- Identified key cost drivers and trends

**Result:**
Improved visibility into operating expenses and supported budgeting decisions.

---

## Budget vs Actual Analysis

Analyzed budget vs actual performance to identify variances and provide insights.

**Tools:** Excel

**What I did:**
- Compared planned vs actual financial data
- Investigated major variances
- Summarized findings for reporting

**Result:**
Helped improve financial planning accuracy and cost control.
